free_text: Disintegration of Li-7 in inelastic scattering of
Inelastic scattering of gamma quanta, one of the
poorly investigated processes in nuclear physics, is
as an an example. When investigating phototritons from
the Li7 nucleus by means of the analysis of triton
yield for narrow energy interval, a group of tritons
with a production threshold between that of the
Tritons with such production threshold may be related
only to the reaction (gamma,gamma't).  The integral
cross section for this reaction was found to be
(1.1(0.3)) MeV*mb for tritons with energies 3.5-10 MeV
The cross section of the reaction (g,g') was also
